recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: Superbad
recommendations.overview: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-soaked party goes awry.

recommendations.title: Incoming
recommendations.overview: Their first week of high school. The biggest party of the year. Mistakes will be made as four teenage boys navigate a night of mayhem and debauchery.

recommendations.title: A Good Old Fashioned Orgy
recommendations.overview: A group of 30-year-olds who have been friends since high school attempt to throw an end-of-summer orgy.

recommendations.title: Dirty Kids
recommendations.overview: French seniors enroll in summer camp.

recommendations.title: Safer at Home
recommendations.overview: Two years into the pandemic, a group of friends throw an online party with a night of games, drinking and drugs. After taking an ecstasy pill, things go terribly wrong and the safety of their home becomes more terrifying than the raging chaos outside

recommendations.title: Assassination Nation
recommendations.overview: After an anonymous hacker begins leaking the private data of thousands living in a small American town, the townspeople spiral into madness, with four high school seniors at the center of the maelstrom.

recommendations.title: Can't Hardly Wait
recommendations.overview: It's graduation day at Huntington Hills High, and you know what that means - time to party. And not just any party, either. This one will be a night to remember, as the nerds become studs, the jocks are humiliated, and freshman crushes blossom into g

recommendations.title: Spontaneous
recommendations.overview: When students in their high school begin inexplicably exploding (literally), seniors Mara and Dylan struggle to survive in a world where each moment may be their last.

recommendations.title: I Love You, Beth Cooper
recommendations.overview: A valedictorian's declaration of love for a high-school cheerleader launches a night of revelry, reflection and romance for a group of graduating seniors.
